message:
fix(core): add BETWEEN/IN/CASE/CAST to HAVING evaluator

The HAVING clause evaluator (evaluate_having_value) was missing match
arms for BETWEEN, IN, CASE, and CAST expressions, causing them to
silently return NULL via the catch-all.  Added all four with proper
three-valued NULL semantics plus 3 regression tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
